(15) Learning Hexo from Scratch - Themes: Vexo
The next theme is Vexo, inspired by the official Vue.js docs. If you're into Vue.js's style, this one's worth a look.
Install is the same as before — in the terminal:
. From here it's identical to the previous post — open
, then fire up the dev server and you'll see the theme has switched.
Pretty simple, right? Most themes install the same way.
Vexo is a really lightweight theme, so
is approachable for beginners. The main sections you'll want to tweak:
I'd recommend updating those three sections, especially the author block. For gitment, decide whether you want to use gitment or disqus — you just swap out the relevant IDs.

You'll also notice that clicking Tags and Project on the site throws an error, while About works fine. That's because we haven't created the Tags or Project pages yet, but About was created earlier. Vexo actually ships with these pages prepared so you don't have to
Just copy or move the Tags and Project folders from
Restart the dev server, click Tags and Project — they both work now.
You might think "wait, the Project page is showing someone else's GitHub — can I make it mine?" Yes — open
Restart the dev server and the Project page updates:
Vexo is really clean, but the one downside is no multi-language support. So if you want to switch the simplified Chinese to traditional Chinese, you'll have to edit the templates under
A representative Vexo user is PJCHENder's
— give it a browse before deciding if this theme's right for you.
See you in the next theme post.

html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html pre.shiki code .sKpQp, html code.shiki .sKpQp{--shiki-default:#72F088}html pre.shiki code .sMAXC, html code.shiki .sMAXC{--shiki-default:#F0F3F6}html pre.shiki code .sTRMh, html code.shiki .sTRMh{--shiki-default:#ADDCFF}
